weights_block_reason: RESOLVED 2026-05-02 NAP.M4.5: native approved all 30 signals; pass_2 binding gate discharged. Downstream pipeline may consume these weights with the n=1 disclaimer carried through. Held-out partition at M4-C is the second-line defense per SHADOW_MODE_PROTOCOL §5; any signal failing held-out generalization gets reverted.
n1_disclaimer: VALIDITY NOTICE: These calibration weights are derived from a single native's (n=1) life event corpus. They are provisional, subject to revision as the corpus grows, and must not be interpreted as universal Jyotish signal weights. Per MACRO_PLAN §3.5.A Principle 1 — n=1 validity disclaimer.

approval_chain.pass_1_notes: Pass_1 surrogate review approved. mean_match_rate>=0.4 AND variance<=0.3 AND N>=3 verified by direct re-read of shadow file. No demotion (mean<0.4 OR variance>0.3 not triggered). See LL1_TWO_PASS_APPROVAL_v1_0.md §4 for tier rationale. Pass_2 = NAP.M4.5 at M4-B close (binding final gate).
approval_chain.pass_2_notes: Pass_2 NAP.M4.5 native approval. Native approve-all of 30/30 signals after review of tier classification + Tier-C joint-firing analysis. Production gate lifted; n=1 disclaimer rides through. See LL1_TWO_PASS_APPROVAL_v1_0.md §5 pass_2 block.

approval_chain.pass_1_notes: Pass_1 surrogate review approved (Tier-C borderline). mean=0.4545 var=0.2727 just above thresholds; identical descriptive statistics across SIG.MSR.{118,119,143} flagged for NAP.M4.5 native scrutiny: independent phenomena vs one phenomenon counted three times. See LL1_TWO_PASS_APPROVAL_v1_0.md §3.3 + §6 R.LL1TPA.2. Pass_2 = NAP.M4.5 binding final gate.
approval_chain.pass_2_notes: Pass_2 NAP.M4.5 native approval. Native verdict on Tier-C joint-firing question = (a) three independent calibrated phenomena. Reasoning: distinct planetary entities (Mars/Venus/Saturn-Venus-Moon-Mars), non-overlapping event subsets (zero triple overlap empirically confirmed), distinct Jyotish valences (Ruchaka-absence + Malavya-absence are auspicious-yoga absences; Sarpa-absence is inauspicious-yoga absence). Identical aggregate statistics are a natal-constant artifact, not redundancy. Held-out partition at M4-C is the generalization check; revert path available per SHADOW_MODE_PROTOCOL §5 if any fails to generalize.
